title: Digital Marketing Bootcamp — July 2026
description: Join our intensive 1-day digital marketing bootcamp where you will learn SEO, social media strategy, content marketing, and Google Ads fundamentals. Perfect for beginners and entrepreneurs wanting to understand the digital landscape.

title: Scholarship Entrance Test — Batch 1
description: Register and attend the scholarship entrance test for our first batch starting July 2026. Students who pass the test and meet the criteria will receive scholarship support of up to ₹50,000 for their chosen course.

title: AI Tools & Career Workshop
description: A free live workshop on the top AI tools every digital marketer and developer needs in 2026. Learn ChatGPT, Midjourney, Canva AI, Google Gemini, and automation workflows that save 10+ hours per week.
